display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mega Metro
programme.desc: The team faces a tough challenge - boring beneath Sydney's 230-year-old CBD. At Pitt Street Station, eight buildings are demolished, including a 14-storey tower.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: An Aston Martin DB6 in need of total restoration looks set to break the Mathewsons auction record and news of a rare Vincent motorbike arriving causes a stir.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep.

programme.title: Could Hitler Have Been Stopped? The Politics Of Appeasement
programme.desc: First in a two-part documentary considering how Hitler could have been stopped, focusing on the failure of politicians and other leaders to understand the threat t.

programme.title: Could Hitler Have Been Stopped? The Politics Of Appeasement
programme.desc: Historians argue about whether Adolf Hitler could have been stopped before the Second World War ever broke out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Aberglasney Gardens in Carmarthenshire, where items include a remnant from the Charge of the Light Brigade.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce takes the team to Bath, where items include a pair of antique bronzes found under a caravan.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to collect some vintage motorcycles from a garage at the bottom of the garden in the North-East of England.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds two rare Fiats and a VW Corrado. Derek has his work cut out trying to remove an old Morris that appears to be supporting the garage roof. What could possibly g.

programme.title: Could Hitler Have Been Stopped? The Politics Of Appeasement
programme.desc: First in a two-part documentary considering how Hitler could have been stopped, focusing on the failure of politicians and other leaders to understand the threat the Fu.

programme.title: Could Hitler Have Been Stopped? The Politics Of Appeasement
programme.desc: Historians argue about whether Adolf Hitler could have been stopped before the Second World War ever broke out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Aberglasney Gardens in Carmarthenshire, where items include a remnant from the Charge of the Light Brigade.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming faces a journey of many challenges as he runs aground and breaks down in Nottingham.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming has problems with ice on the Grand Union Canal, and ends his journey in Braunston, Northamptonshire.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and Ken are evicted from their dingy hovel. There's a self-contained flat at Shirley's that's empty, but she'll have to get the idea past her dad first..

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Ken falls in love with the girlfriend of one of Wolfie's prison-bound friends and arranges to take her away for the weekend, but Wolfie tags along to keep an eye on things.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Following a by-election humiliation in which he gained a mere 6 votes, Wolfie plans to kidnap the Conservative who beat him. There's nothing as bad as democracy.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to collect some vintage motorcycles from a garage at the bottom of the garden in the North-East of England.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds two rare Fiats and a VW Corrado. Derek has his work cut out trying to remove an old Morris that appears to be supporting the garage roof. What could possibly g.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo restores a pair of designer chairs, while Henry Cole breathes new life into a decrepit garden table, transforming it into a colourful and valuable new one.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley examines the author's later life and discovers how personal happiness ushered in a golden age for her writing.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Mega Metro
programme.desc: The project's most daunting challenge - tunnelling under Sydney Harbour - begins. At Martin Place, engineers juggle skyscraper construction above and station excavation below.

programme.title: Mega Metro
programme.desc: With deadlines looming, crews race to install tracks, cabling, ventilation, safety systems and 900,000 plants. The first driverless train arrives in Sydney for testing.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus want to do a 4x4, but their dream list of cars is short as they can't afford much on their budget. However, Will has a plan, and steers them towards a friend's Suzuki SJ. S2 Ep.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want a classic Morris Minor, and they find an ex-police car in a lovely shade of blue. But the seller wants them to bid online - they can't pay and take it away.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want an 'Eastern Bloc' car to see whether the old Skoda jokes were deserved. Bidding low they win an orange Estelle, but how can they add any value to it.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus twists Will's arm when he spies a super-rare Renault 5, but back at the workshop they realise they have one heck of a problem to fix.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and Ken are evicted from their dingy hovel. There's a self-contained flat at Shirley's that's empty, but she'll have to get the idea past her dad first..

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Ken falls in love with the girlfriend of one of Wolfie's prison-bound friends and arranges to take her away for the weekend, but Wolfie tags along to keep an eye on things.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Following a by-election humiliation in which he gained a mere 6 votes, Wolfie plans to kidnap the Conservative who beat him. There's nothing as bad as democracy.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: As Robbie leaves the scenic Llangollen Canal, he faces a journey of running repairs and narrowboat maintenance on the old Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: With the Anderton Boat Lift out of action, Robbie explores the scenic River Weaver onboard a borrowed narrowboat called 'Tench'.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames.

programme.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve heads to Indonesia, the world's largest archipelagic nation - home to 220 million people speaking 700 different languages on a collection of 18,000 islands.

programme.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve visits South America, where he learns how the Galapagos Islands are under threat from tourists and meets remote indigenous tribes in Brazil.

programme.title: This World: The Tea Trail with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels to East African countries Kenya and Uganda to meet some of the millions of people involved in producing tea and learn more about the processes involved.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The guys are drawn by the curves of a stunning 1999 Morgan with an incredible 4.6 V8 engine, but things aren't as good as they seem when they get to the garage.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: On the way to pick up two lovely '70s Lotus sports cars, Derek takes to the skies for his first ever helicopter flight in a 1967 Bell 47 chopper.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: In Shropshire a Great Western Railway 'Modified Hall' steam engine and its tender is being taken out of service as it needs a safety inspection.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan described as the Rolls Royce of campervans.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A 'battle of the sexes' tennis match is disrupted when the woman playing is injured, and Chief Constable Brackenreid discovers that it was sabotage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Fall of the House of Newsome: Rupert Newsome is accused of murdering his wife Lucinda, and despite his choice to represent himself in court, Effie tries her best to help.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A criminal profiler joins the team to help investigate a double murder case, but Patrick clashes with her scientific approach and the pair disagree on the killer's identity.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a magician dies during a practice-run of her latest routine, Charlie and Rex must look beyond the smoke and mirrors to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A chance meeting with lawyer Walter Morgan has far-reaching consequences for Carrie when he reveals key information on several murders.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Enjoy the scenery and a murder or two. The death of a scientist on the side of a live volcano proves a difficult case to crack for Humphrey and his team.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A 'battle of the sexes' tennis match is disrupted when the woman playing is injured, and Chief Constable Brackenreid discovers that it was sabotage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Fall of the House of Newsome: Rupert Newsome is accused of murdering his wife Lucinda, and despite his choice to represent himself in court, Effie tries her best to help.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A criminal profiler joins the team to help investigate a double murder case, but Patrick clashes with her scientific approach and the pair disagree on the killer's identity.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a magician dies during a practice-run of her latest routine, Charlie and Rex must look beyond the smoke and mirrors to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A chance meeting with lawyer Walter Morgan has far-reaching consequences for Carrie when he reveals key information on several murders.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Enjoy the scenery and a murder or two. The death of a scientist on the side of a live volcano proves a difficult case to crack for Humphrey and his team.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric created by GK Chesterton. When a body is found in a locked bank vault, Brown must save an innocent man.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A chance encounter with a recently released convict lands Sabrina in the middle of a murder interrogation where it seems only she can secure a confession in time.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Enjoy the scenery and a murder or two. The death of a scientist on the side of a live volcano proves a difficult case to crack for Humphrey and his team.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a magician dies during a practice-run of her latest routine, Charlie and Rex must look beyond the smoke and mirrors to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A 'battle of the sexes' tennis match is disrupted when the woman playing is injured, and Chief Constable Brackenreid discovers that it was sabotage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Fall of the House of Newsome: Rupert Newsome is accused of murdering his wife Lucinda, and despite his choice to represent himself in court, Effie tries her best to help.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brackenreid learns his son is wanted for murder and refuses Murdoch's help with the case.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a strange telegraph is intercepted, Murdoch and Ogden are awoken by their old associate, Terence Meyers, who believes James Pendrick sent the message for Murdoch.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the electrocuted body of a man is found, Murdoch and Brackenreid investigate a pair of researchers known as 'The Frankensteins' for their bizarre psychological studies.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: Eliza teams up with Duke to investigate a burglary at a high-end brothel whose clients include important members of the British government.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: When a close friend of Mr Potts is murdered, Eliza finds herself investigating the dark and macabre world of Victorian undertakers.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Martin Shaw in the fifth series of the superb mystery set in 1960s Northumberland. Gently probes the death of a girl in a car owned by local aristocrats.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown is trapped in a derelict building when a former music hall comedian swears revenge.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Flambeau enlists Father Brown's help to steal the pope's coronation gift to the Queen of England.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Lady Felicia's reckless driving lands her in a hospital bed next to Mrs McCarthy with a killer on the loose.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown deduces that the apparent suicide of a recently returned RAF pilot was actually murder.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Arch's investigation into Gallagher takes a turn when his son becomes the prime suspect after a dead body washes up at a music festival.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman is murdered on his yacht, a deckhand becomes the prime suspect. However, Rex leads Mark to believe that the motive might be more complicated.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A chance encounter with a recently released convict lands Sabrina in the middle of a murder interrogation where it seems only she can secure a confession in time.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack is on the case when a zoo owner is killed by a tranquilliser dart in an empty park - with the only possible culprits in the staff area when the shot was fired.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A visit to Chummy's holiday camp leads to another murder mystery for the sleuthing cleric.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard questions his engineering abilities when he and Sheldon can't even get a toy drone to fly! Meanwhile, Raj pits his parents against each other when his father cuts him off financially. S8 E22

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When a promising opportunity to save Woodstone is threatened by a personal conflict, Sam and Jay are forced into a difficult choice.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Harper avoids a hard truth. Alf and Roo work to heal. Tane supports Mackenzie.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Bafta award winner Michael McIntyre is joined at London's Theatre Royal Drury Lane by Dermot O’Leary, Tony Hadley, Tom Kerridge and Jess Glynne.

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: A look back on the wedding day of Les & Lindy twenty years ago. Blissful in their honeymoon phase with success burgeoning in both their careers, chaos begins to trickle in. S1 E9

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Suggs, Katherine Ryan and Talia Mar join the regulars for the legendary pop culture panel show's revival, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Teams put their culinary techniques to the test and compete to earn their dish a spot on the tasting menu of a VIP Johnson and Wales 50th anniversary dinner honouring the legendary culinary school.

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: Having missed Cheer Camp, the team must submit a skills tape in order to qualify for Daytona. But the headwinds are against Courteney as making the tape falls right in the middle of finals week. S1E10

programme.title: Laid
programme.desc: Ruby, AJ and her coworker Brad, must track down the person who is responsible for what's happening and can undo all of it. S1 E7

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: In the first round of the quarter-finals, four Contenders battle Gladiators for a place in the semis. An unexpected series of events during Hang Tough shocks the arena.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Andy Lee is joined in the studio by Mike Goldstein, Becky Lucas, Dilruk Jayasinha and a panel of 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: With just a few spots left on each team, turning a chair is more challenging than ever. A group of passionate artists, including a young flutist and a unique beatboxer seek to impress the coaches.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Bigsies And Littles
programme.desc: Two penguins, Big Blue & Little Blue, explore everyday life with curiosity, kindness, and song, finding big meaning in little moments.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell dates Fran's double. Meanwhile, Brighton has problems with junior high. S2 E1

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: Fresh Fairytales is BACK!! Chill with the cast while we dive into our new segment D for Diaspora. Lord Niue's fashion capsule serve’s all the fit checks we want - Culture, Captivate and Lock in!

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody stands his ground.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: When the search for Maddie’s killer puts Simon in real jeopardy and exposes Maddie’s connection to the living world, Maddie must navigate Split River High’s spooky spectral underbelly. S1 E4

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Stephanie has dreams of being a caterer, but is humiliated by her giant baseball-sized scalp bump; Deb is afraid that the growth on the side of her knee may eventually paralyze her.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When the SoHo DMV lands a glossy magazine feature, Barb struggles with feeling overlooked, stirring up old insecurities she thought she'd left behind. S1 E16

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening match of Round 8 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Magic host the Stars from Claudelands Arena in Hamilton.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, let's just say that his own relationship with Amy has taken an "interesting" turn. S8 E24

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another girl. Meanwhile, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy pushes pause on their relationship. S9 E1

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the second match of Round 8 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Pulse take on the Tactix from Fly Palmy Arena in Palmerston North.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Academy Award-winning fantasy-romance about a ghost who saves his fiancée from the man who murdered him with the help of a nutty psychic. Starring Demi Moore, Patrick Swayze and Whoopi Goldberg.(1990

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Amy Gledhill gets creative with spoons and Kumail Nanjiani impresses all with his jaw strength.

programme.title: American Princess
programme.desc: Amanda’s family lures her back to New York City. Delilah plans a party to celebrate Lulu and Shart’s daughter, Breeze. Maggie wrestles with Brian’s new romance. S1 E5

programme.title: Fight Night: The Million Dollar Heist
programme.desc: Chicken Man finds himself on the run and finds an unlikely partnership. S1 E5

programme.title: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: Rose proves she's a great leader, but at a terrible cost. Taking control of her life, Lissa makes a radical decision. Victor takes a stand. S1 E5

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Howson captures the creature that attacked Luce in the lake and interrogates it; while Luce comforts Daniel over Cassie's death, Penn uncovers troubling truths about her past. S1 E4

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: Fresh Fairytales is BACK!! Chill with the cast while we dive into our new segment D for Diaspora. Lord Niue's fashion capsule serve’s all the fit checks we want - Culture, Captivate and Lock in!

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: What Will I Be Today?
programme.desc: Join your new friends Kauri, Esera and Wing Gai as they go on imaginative adventures to solve every day problems.

programme.title: Bird's Eye View
programme.desc: After obsessively watching TV, Big Jim realises humans can’t get enough of talent shows. So why not have one of their own? The best act wins!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Josh and his dog crash back 700 years in time, to a mysterious land where taniwhas roam and ancient warriors rule.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: Tipua
programme.desc: With India’s help and research money from Dr Sabine, Ārepa has finally found a way to get to Antarctica. However mysterious forces seem determined to stop her.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran discovers an old admirer who just won't go away, while Brighton tries to avoid dating an unpopular classmate. S2 E2

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: Michael Bublé, Snoop Dogg, Niall Horan and Reba McEntire each pair two artists to perform solo against each other, then select a winner to move on to the playoffs.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Sonny pushes beyond his limits. Leah fights for Alf’s reputation. David struggles with small-town policing.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nestled deep in the British countryside, The Repair Shop is a place where battered, broken but beloved artefacts are brought back to life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie have 15 days to totally transform their entrance hall and stairs. Donna and Paul are fitting their derelict watermill’s first ever boiler.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: In North Uist, one of the remote Outer Hebrides, Justin, Emma, and architect David are building two storm-resistant holiday homes. Weather permitting, they’ll assemble everything on-site in just day

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series‎
programme.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at a luxury hotel in Ibiza, where cutting edge biohacking therapies are offered alongside cacao ceremonies inspired by the islands hippy roots.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George sees red when Arlo secretly switches school subjects. Fiona struggles in her new parenting role. S2 E11

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: Scott & Mig are off on a deep drop adventure and the head to head challenge is set to land the longest fish. With a guaranteed consequence on the line the boys waste no time hooking in.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Leaft Foods create a plant-based protein for people and a co-product for stock; a large-scale operation grows vegetables in Canterbury; and a walnut grower co-operative develops value-added products.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Happy Hour: A busy farming family rallies their community to buy the local hotel, creating a bustling hub that unites locals and celebrates small-town spirit.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: A pupdate with Police pup Stark, check out the acrobatics the Corrections B litter roll into their routine assessment, and which Biosecurity Beagle plays the fool? S4 E6

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa get creative with the humble and versatile potato as they make dishes that include Lisa's veggie cottage pie and proper cheeseburgers with potato buns.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Hong Kong Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy invites good friend and food critic Grace Dent to Hong Kong as they visit one of its finest restaurants and one of its last traditional villages.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Clay jewellery artist Rachel from Birmingham and coppersmith and sculptor Roy from Wiltshire are both hoping that their passions can become profitable businesses.

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: This time on Highway Cops: Salmon secrets from a speeding fisher, a truck tumbles over a ledge, and a lame mustang blocks traffic on a Taranaki highway.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Four contestants, one Big Brass Mug, and a host who takes no prisoners. Tom Gleeson tests his charges on their expert topics of Ghostbusters, Pink Floyd, classic Minis and the Kim Dynasty.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: The auditions return to Blackpool's Winter Gardens as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges, Simon, Amanda, Alesha and KSI.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: The auditions return to Blackpool's Winter Gardens as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges, Simon, Amanda, Alesha and KSI.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: After a murder at her university reunion, Becks finds herself on the wrong side of an investigation. Could one of her friends be responsible? S3 E2

programme.title: Moving Houses
programme.desc: Sarah and Stu's dream retreat at remote Farewell Spit faces big challenges as isolation, one-lane bridges, and the daunting Tākaka Hill make placing their perfect house a real adventure.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day. S1 E5

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: Series Premiere: When a reckless pursuit leads to tragedy, Senior Constable Zil Ahmed and vulnerable teen Dalia Tun must reckon with the aftermath. S1 E1

programme.title: Lockerbie: A Search For Truth
programme.desc: Season Finale: Jim is left at a loss when Megrahi gives up his appeal. Questioning everything he believes, he wonders if he will ever know the truth. S1 E5

programme.title: Chateau DIY at Christmas
programme.desc: Janet and Philip get creative to make Christmas truly unique and set about building a flying sleigh. Alison and Zion embark on a massive restoration of their derelict hunting lodge.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: An automated scanning robot providing vineyards with improved yield predictions; a diverse Canterbury operation with an online channel; and a farm and nursery enterprise helping to rebuild lives.

programme.title: Barkley Manor
programme.desc: At the Woof Dog Show there’s a surprise entry into the category of Most Butch. Anna is outsmarted by her young cavoodle - will she finally win the battle to control Princess Daisy’s chaos? S1 E4

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programme.desc: National treasure Ainsley Harriott challenges some of Britain's best chefs to make inspiring meals from ingredients available in and around a stunning selection of National Trust properties.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: A returning New Zealand traveller experiences phone search fury in Customs red zone. Immigration turns up a problematic past with a US visitor.

programme.title: We Are Rātana
programme.desc: In 1918 the Rātana Faith was started by T.W Rātana. But how are the Rātana faithful and the community faring now? A heartfelt and contemporary look at the Rātana way of life.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off Extra Slice
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood, Harry Hill and Melvin Odoom join Jo and Tom to enjoy Dessert Week. Which baker's Spanish cheesecake had them Basque-ing in glory? And who had a wobble with their trifle?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his quest to trace the southern tropic, travelling from South Africa to Madagascar.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve crosses mainland Australia, visiting a ghost town contaminated by a nearby asbestos mine and a deprived Aborigine community near Uluru.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve visits an anthropologist living with a forest tribe in Argentina, and tours a neighbourhood once considered the most dangerous in the world.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve traces the path of the northern tropic around the globe. He begins in Mexico before heading east to Cuba and finishing in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his quest to trace the southern tropic, travelling from South Africa to Madagascar.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve crosses mainland Australia, visiting a ghost town contaminated by a nearby asbestos mine and a deprived Aborigine community near Uluru.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve visits an anthropologist living with a forest tribe in Argentina, and tours a neighbourhood once considered the most dangerous in the world.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve traces the path of the northern tropic around the globe. He begins in Mexico before heading east to Cuba and finishing in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. The family is thrown into panic when Mr Boswell is arrested for stealing the Corporation's cart.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian laughs in one of the most popular sitcoms of the 1980s. Mr Boswell hears the date of his court case, but it clashes with a wedding. Written by Carla 'Liver Birds' Lane.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: The smash hit 80s comedy series about a Liverpudlian family doing what they can to survive unemployment and poverty. Mr Boswell is being tried for stealing the Corporation dustcart.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: 1980s fashions run wild in the sitcom following the Liverpudlian family struggling to survive. Adrian and Eddie are kidnapped by Yizzel over gambling debts.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's popular 1980s sitcom revolving around a family of loveable, Liverpudlian rogues. Here, the Boswells all get jobs, and Jack loses the van in the Mersey.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More laughs with the Liverpudlian family. Joe meets up with Roxy but her husband is not pleased to see him. Mr Boswell and Lilo Lill are in a watchman's hut when an accident occurs.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. The family is thrown into panic when Mr Boswell is arrested for stealing the Corporation's cart.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian laughs in one of the most popular sitcoms of the 1980s. Mr Boswell hears the date of his court case, but it clashes with a wedding. Written by Carla 'Liver Birds' Lane.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: The smash hit 80s comedy series about a Liverpudlian family doing what they can to survive unemployment and poverty. Mr Boswell is being tried for stealing the Corporation dustcart.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: 1980s fashions run wild in the sitcom following the Liverpudlian family struggling to survive. Adrian and Eddie are kidnapped by Yizzel over gambling debts.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's popular 1980s sitcom revolving around a family of loveable, Liverpudlian rogues. Here, the Boswells all get jobs, and Jack loses the van in the Mersey.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More laughs with the Liverpudlian family. Joe meets up with Roxy but her husband is not pleased to see him. Mr Boswell and Lilo Lill are in a watchman's hut when an accident occurs.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. The family is thrown into panic when Mr Boswell is arrested for stealing the Corporation's cart.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian laughs in one of the most popular sitcoms of the 1980s. Mr Boswell hears the date of his court case, but it clashes with a wedding. Written by Carla 'Liver Birds' Lane.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: The smash hit 80s comedy series about a Liverpudlian family doing what they can to survive unemployment and poverty. Mr Boswell is being tried for stealing the Corporation dustcart.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: 1980s fashions run wild in the sitcom following the Liverpudlian family struggling to survive. Adrian and Eddie are kidnapped by Yizzel over gambling debts.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's popular 1980s sitcom revolving around a family of loveable, Liverpudlian rogues. Here, the Boswells all get jobs, and Jack loses the van in the Mersey.

programme.desc: More laughs with the Liverpudlian family. Joe meets up with Roxy but her husband is not pleased to see him. Mr Boswell and Lilo Lill are in a watchman's hut when an accident occurs.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. The family is thrown into panic when Mr Boswell is arrested for stealing the Corporation's cart.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian laughs in one of the most popular sitcoms of the 1980s. Mr Boswell hears the date of his court case, but it clashes with a wedding. Written by Carla 'Liver Birds' Lane.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Sunderland-born actress Melanie Hill joins Robson on his pursuit of outdoor activities to help relax and recharge as they travel to one of the UK's biggest waterfalls.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Serbia, Fort Pike in Louisiana, and a mountainside refuge in Georgia that was revealed to the world by an act of God.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a grand structure in Hull that was reduced to rubble by Hitler's planes, Casa Albero in Italy, USS Hornet in California and the Sofia tunnels.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a decrepit Liberian landmark with American origins, a desolate town in Belgium and a pioneering scientific structure in Cleveland.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring the Dew Drop Inn in New Orleans, a music mecca that dared to take on the authorities and paid the price, and Belgica Fort, built to defend an unlikely treasure.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Serbia, Fort Pike in Louisiana, and a mountainside refuge in Georgia that was revealed to the world by an act of God.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a grand structure in Hull that was reduced to rubble by Hitler's planes, Casa Albero in Italy, USS Hornet in California and the Sofia tunnels.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a decrepit Liberian landmark with American origins, a desolate town in Belgium and a pioneering scientific structure in Cleveland.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring the Dew Drop Inn in New Orleans, a music mecca that dared to take on the authorities and paid the price, and Belgica Fort, built to defend an unlikely treasure.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Witty wordplay and superlative sketches with the comedy duo. Sketches include 'My Life Insurance' and 'Idiot Wife Swap'. Guest Elaine Paige sings 'If You Don't Want My Love'.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The bespectacled comedy legends making us laugh in 1983. The classic sketches include Bushman's Holiday and Raiders of the Last Auk.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Stalwarts of comedy Ronnie Barker and Ronnie Corbett offer up more rib-tickling skits. Other gems include Big Blue Book and Party Lines.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More wry skits and puntastic comedy from the late, great Ronnies B and C. Sketches include Filling In, Martial Arts, and Office Quickie.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic comedy, monologues and music with Ronnie Corbett and the late, great Ronnie Barker. Sketches include Just Impediment, Minister of Cuts, and Travel Gabble.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Witty wordplay and superlative sketches with the comedy duo. Sketches include 'My Life Insurance' and 'Idiot Wife Swap'. Guest Elaine Paige sings 'If You Don't Want My Love'.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The bespectacled comedy legends making us laugh in 1983. The classic sketches include Bushman's Holiday and Raiders of the Last Auk.
